full_text:
Xiahou Hui (Yuanrong) 夏侯徽 (媛容)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Hui (夏侯徽), styledYuanrong (媛容). A clever adviser to Sima Shi, poisoned by her husband due to conflicting loyalties. Xiahou Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xiahou Hui lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
